best_trajectory.observation:
[Answer Box] MIAMI -- Venezuela, a country steeped in baseball tradition, made history on two fronts Saturday night when its national team defeated Japan 8-5 in the World Baseball Classic quarterfinals at LoanDepot Park.
Venezuela vs. Japan in 2026 World Baseball Classic quarterfinals: Venezuela took down Japan, the 2023 WBC champions, with an 8-5 come-from-behind win in the quarterfinals at loanDepot park on Saturday night. (https://www.mlb.com/news/venezuela-vs-japan-in-2026-world-baseball-classic-quarterfinals)
Venezuela vs. Japan 2026 World Baseball Classic | Game Highlights: ... and scores! https://www.mlb.com/ (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QFIJzQeaCkc)
2023 World Baseball Classic championship - Wikipedia: Japan won 3–2 to earn a record-extending third World Baseball Classic title. Shohei Ohtani won the most valuable player award. (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2023_World_Baseball_Classic_championship)
Venezuela defeats Japan 8-5, knocks out defending WBC champion ...: Venezuela has upset Japan 8-5 in the World Baseball Classic quarterfinals, eliminating the defending champion. (https://www.cbssports.com/mlb/news/2026-world-baseball-classic-venezuela-japan-score-result/)

best_trajectory.observation:
- **Clear signs of editing/obfuscation:** Multiple faces (players and spectators) are covered with uniform, soft-edged rectangular blurs. The blur blocks don’t follow facial contours and look like a deliberate privacy mask added after the fact.
- **No strong signs of AI image generation:** Stadium signage and text (e.g., “loanDepot park”, “@WBCBaseball”) are sharp and consistent; uniforms, equipment, and field markings have coherent geometry and lighting. No obvious “melted” details or impossible anatomy.
- **No obvious compositing artifacts:** Shadows, perspective, and depth-of-field look consistent across pitcher/catcher/umpire/batter; no visible cutout halos or mismatched edges besides the intentional blur masks.
- **Counterfactual content not inferable from pixels alone:** The image depicts a plausible baseball game scene; nothing visually impossible. The only manipulation evident is the added face blurring.
